The attachment is typed specifically as board_items
It records an exact UTC added timestamp

References an external board item via a board:// URI scheme
Minimal metadata-only attachment with no prose or code
concerns: No explanatory text about why this attachment exists
The content or state of the referenced board item is not included
No author or source context is provided

summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record (id att-f1229c51) in the dragnet-development channel that links attachment type board_items to board item board://item-52f610a3 and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to persistently associate a channel attachment with a specific board item and capture when that association was added.
